tables: Note CANalyzer pro/CANalyzer exp supports: Display elements with assigned signals and system variables Control elements with assigned system variables CANalyzer fun supports only display elements with assigned signals System variables are not supported by CANalyzer fun. In CANalyzer all control and display elements with assigned environment variables will automatically be deactivated, due to the fact that environment variables are not supported in CANalyzer.

sections.heading: Loading panel files from newer versions

paragraphs: Only functions of this version are supported. Functions of the newer version will automatically be deactivated.
If you save a loaded panel file with this version, all functions of the new version will get lost.
Install the current Service Pack for version 7.0. You can find this on www.vector.com
tables: Note Only functions of this version are supported. Functions of the newer version will automatically be deactivated. If you save a loaded panel file with this version, all functions of the new version will get lost.

sections.heading: Convert panels into Panel Designer panels

paragraphs: Panel Editor panels (*.cnp) are automatically converted by opening them in the Panel Designer.
Panel Editor panel will be automatically converted when loading a CANalyzer configuration and saved in XVP format when saving the configuration.
